name: Claw
description: "Screams occasionally, slowing everyone in his range down. He's really loud."
detail1: - Claw floats to the nearest player at 2 studs per second, Killing on contact
detail2: - Claw Is a starting enemy and has a Limit of 3 permanant Claws and has no temporary cap
deathmsg: "Victim was grabbed and torn apart by Claw." "Claw is easy to dodge Victim. Sometimes" "Victim was killed by sharp objects." "Victim hates the human anatomy. Wait that thing isn't human." "Random dodged the Claw but Victim fell short." "The Claw targeted Victim, and quickly succeeded" "I dont see what's wrong, did you guys have a faster Claw or something?" "Seriously? Victim died to that Claw thing again." "There's no way.. ppfft.. Victim.. TO CLAW??" "All Victim had to do was run, in short, they failed." "Little do you know Victim, Claw is only using 0.001% of its power."
